name: Human Review Gate
description: Presents the proposed fix to an on-call engineer for review and sign-off before any changes are applied to production. In --interactive mode the engine pauses and waits for operator input.

checks.prompt:
Prepare a human review brief for the following fix proposal:
{fix_input}

Format as a concise decision document:
## Fix Review Required
### Proposed Fix
### Risk Assessment (1-5)
### Blast Radius if Fix Fails
### Reversibility
### Operator Decision: [ ] APPROVE TO DEPLOY  [ ] REQUEST_CHANGES  [ ] ESCALATE TO L3

Context: {retryContext}
